name_en: .🌷【New】GG Kids Animal Print Tote. The 2024 Early Spring Kids collection artfully blends circular interlocking GG and playful frog embroidery, playfully interpreting tailoring style. New apparel pieces and accessories are presented in different colors and materials, playfully highlighting the brand's narrative of childlike innocence. This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with the Gucci animal print, cleverly incorporating white contrast trim. White and beige Supreme canvas, white Supreme canvas trim, Gucci animal print by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open interior pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.
name_cn:
.🌷【New】GG Kids Animal Print Tote. The 2024 Early Spring Kids collection artfully blends circular interlocking GG and playful frog embroidery, playfully interpreting tailoring style. New apparel pieces and accessories are presented in different colors and materials, playfully highlighting the brand's narrative of childlike innocence. This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with the Gucci animal print, cleverly incorporating white contrast trim. White and beige Supreme canvas, white Supreme canvas trim, Gucci animal print by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open interior pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.
Model: 605614.
Dimensions: 25(L) x 28.5(W) x 11cm(T)cm
Color: Puppy Mushroom/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
